Boiler repair & annual servicing

If your boiler has stopped working or your annual service is due, our Leeds engineers provide honest diagnostics and safe repairs.

  • Same-week appointments where possible
  • Genuine parts for major boiler brands
  • Landlord CP12 available alongside servicing
  • Safety checks and flue inspection included

Frequently asked questions

My boiler shows an error code—can you help?

Yes. Note the code displayed and call us. We carry common parts for Worcester, Vaillant, Ideal and Baxi boilers.

Does servicing affect my warranty?

Most manufacturers require an annual service by a Gas Safe engineer. We provide a service record for your files.

Get in touch

Contact us for a friendly chat about your requirements.
